headline: Leon Black рҹҡ¶вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё WALKS OUT Epstein Hearing рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ NDA STUNT рҹҺӯрҹ’ј
text: Billionaire Leon Black рҹ•ҙпёҸрҹ’° just YEETED рҹҡӘрҹ’Ё out of a closed-door Capitol hearing рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ”’ after lawmakers asked about those spicy NDAs рҹ”’рҹӨ« signed to silence Epstein victims рҹҳұрҹ’ё. The House Oversight Committee рҹҚ‘рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸ dropped TWO SUBPOENAS рҹ“ңвҡ–пёҸ forcing the Apollo Global Management co-founder рҹҸўрҹ‘‘ to testify on camera рҹ“№рҹҺҘ and under oath рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҷӢвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ about Jeffrey Epstein's role in the hush money рҹӨҗрҹ’ө game. Black, whose name popped like champagne рҹҚҫ in the Epstein files рҹ“Ӯрҹ—ӮпёҸ, walked in voluntarily but bounced рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё the second they mentioned NDAs, leaving his lawyers to drop the final mic рҹҺӨрҹ‘Ӣ. Committee Chair James Comer рҹҚҶрҹ‘ҙ wants the deets: "Was Epstein writing these NDAs? Handing out the hush cash? Why the gag orders?" рҹ§җрҹ’¬ Black's lawyers called it a "political stunt" рҹҺӯрҹӨЎ while insisting Epstein had zero involvement with any NDAs. Meanwhile, Black dropped the Jekyll-Hyde line рҹ§Әрҹ‘№: "I knew Jekyll, didn't know Hyde" and swore he paid Epstein $158M рҹ’ёрҹ“ү for "legit tax advice" рҹ§ҫвң…, not for access to women or blackmail schemes рҹ–Өрҹҡ«. The committee isn't buying it, especially after learning Epstein suggested sending ex-cops рҹҡ”рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ to intimidate Russian model Guzel Ganieva рҹҳЎрҹ’ј into signing an NDA, which Black allegedly drafted to cover up a six-year affair рҹ’Ҹрҹ”Ҙ. Black's team says Ganieva's abuse claims are "demonstrably false" вқҢ and that he was the real extortion victim рҹӨ‘рҹҳӯ. Top Dem Robert Garcia рҹ”Ҙрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј said Black "stormed out" when pressed about NDAs and survivor justice, warning the tycoon will be held accountable if he ghosts the subpoenas рҹ‘»вҡ–пёҸ. Meanwhile Bank of America рҹ’ірҹҸҰ just paid $72.5M over its own Epstein lawsuit рҹӨҜрҹ’ё, proving the Epstein web рҹ•ёпёҸрҹҗҷ keeps snaring Wall Street whales рҹҗӢрҹ“ү. No NDA can hide this drama forever рҹ“ңрҹҡ«!
